overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a fantasy school setting, showing students in robes gathered in a grassy castle courtyard with medieval towers in the background. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, capturing character interactions and subtle animations.

agents.ego_description: standing still watching fellow students converse and practice with brooms in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: group of three students in dark robes conversing, one gesturing animatedly with hands
student holding broomstick interacting with two others near a stone wall with tapestry

entered.detail: golden stone tower with pointed roof and decorative spire
reddish stone tower with crenellated battlements
multiple grey stone spires visible in the distant background
large stone wall section featuring a green and gold decorative tapestry
sloped green lawn covering the ground of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene depicts a sunny afternoon in a castle courtyard with medieval architecture. Two groups of students in robes stand on the grass - one group conversing on the left, while another group on the right appears to be handling broomsticks near a stone wall adorned with a large tapestry. The camera remains stationary, capturing the warm sunlight and detailed stone towers in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, stationary view of a sun-drenched castle courtyard where students engage in quiet afternoon activities. It begins by framing two distinct groups of robed students gathered on the lush grass, with one group conversing on the left. As the eye wanders across the scene, the focus shifts toward the right where other students handle broomsticks beside a stone wall adorned with a large tapestry. The view remains fixed, allowing the warm sunlight to illuminate the detailed medieval architecture and towering stone spires that anchor the background.
